name: CasualMuyu
short_description: Peace comes from nature and regularity Tap the screen to knock the "Muyu" and advance the time while enjoying the neglected daily nature, and you will find peace. Suitable for relieving anxiety and insomnia symptoms.
detailed_description:
This is a relaxing "Muyu" knocking simulation game. You just need to knock the "Muyu", time will pass, experience the day and light, experience the four seasons.

This game is a simple click game, when you click, time will pass a little (with the change of seasons, day, night and random weather).


You can also let it knock automatically, so you can free your hands and immerse yourself in the atmosphere of the environment.

Too stressed? Confused? Tired? Anxious?

Just tap the screen to make some regular sounds, enjoy the neglected daily nature, and you will find peace.


Particularly suitable for relieving anxiety and insomnia symptoms.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Russian*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Portuguese - Portugal*
*languages with full audio support
